summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five fresh open PRs and their hydrated linked refs. No GitHub mutations are planned because close/comment actions are blocked and no PR has complete merge preflight proof.

actions.reason: Looks merge-shaped, but merge policy requires complete merge preflight including Codex /review proof before recommending merge.
The fix path is plausible, but merge proof is incomplete and #92361 discussion explicitly warned against competing PRs, so maintainer judgment is needed before finalization.
Repair/validation is needed before merge consideration because checks are failing or incomplete and merge preflight proof is missing.
A concrete repair/validation path exists, but merge is blocked by missing review proof and required compatibility proof for serialized state.
The patch is small and relevant, but merge preflight is incomplete and artifact state is unstable.
Keep open as related to the candidate fix until #94020 is reviewed and merged.
Related to #94018, but the preferred implementation path needs maintainer judgment.
Same model fallback symptom family, but distinct provider/root-cause scope from #94021.
Closed historical context only; no closure action is valid.
Keep open as related to the candidate fix until #93882 is reviewed and merged.
Independent from the docs, tools diagnostics, model fallback, cron deferral, and Telegram think-menu PRs in this cluster.
Keep open as related to #94021 until the candidate is repaired and merge-ready.
Keep open as related to #94009 until the candidate has review and compatibility proof.
Two open contributor PRs need bounded repair/validation rather than replacement.

needs_human: #94020 merge decision after Codex /review and maintainer review proof are available.
#94018 implementation path because linked issue discussion mentions existing competing PRs #92368 and #92411.
#93882 merge decision after unstable state and failed ClawSweeper infrastructure review are resolved.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair useful contributor branches rather than opening replacement PRs. #94009 needs serialized state compatibility proof and fresh review before merge. #94021 needs failing/pending checks resolved and fresh review before merge. Other PRs appear narrow but lack complete merge preflight, so they remain maintainer-review items.
repair_candidate.pr_title: Repair PR validation for cron deferral and model fallback fixes
repair_candidate.pr_body:
Cluster: live-pr-inventory-20260617T082059-004

This plan repairs useful contributor PRs instead of replacing them. For #94009, confirm serialized state migration/upgrade compatibility and rerun cron-focused validation plus review. For #94021, resolve checks-node-core-fast and any pending checks, then rerun model fallback validation and review.

Source PR credit: #94009 by @mmyzwl and #94021 by @lsr911.
